name: publish-skill
description: A topic-agnostic, fact-first publication workflow scaffold. It audits claims, records evidence gaps, flags logic/style risks, and can apply conservative local edits without hallucinating evidence. Full factual verification requires supplied sources or an external research agent.
core_principles: Topic agnostic: never hard-code a subject domain into the workflow.
Facts before style: claims are mined and checked against supplied evidence before rewriting.
No invented evidence: unknowns must be labelled, weakened, or removed.
Preserve the author's intent and judgement.
Make the final prose human, precise, and readable.
limitations: The bundled local runner is a deterministic heuristic scaffold, not a live web fact-checker.
URL presence and source metadata are recorded but not automatically verified.
semantic_diff.json uses surface claim comparison, not entailment or NLI.
final_verdict.json exposes heuristic_scores, not calibrated quality measurements.
